entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.31
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Reworked plugins system and added capabilities to modify world generation - Adding the hooks `generate_early`, `generate_encounters`, `create_regions`, `create_items`, `write_patch` - However, this breaks old plugins - Slightly changed the `Reusable TMs` choice `yes` to `yes_please` - Old yamls will still work and quietly fix the name change - Added an lz11 decompress algorithm - Fixed the Master Ball seller in N's Castle
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT

entry.title: witchspringrap v0.2.0
entry.content:
## 0.2.0 ### AI Disclaimer; Very reluctantly, this update was made with the help of AI. I do not plan to make this the norm, and I sat on this for a while if I even use this but there was just so much added and working that it would've been dumb not to use it. Further elaboration in discord
A large update over 0.1.3 — full chapter coverage, cross-platform/save reliability, Universal Tracker support, many new checks, and a big pass of progression-logic fixes.
> **⚠️ Upgrade notes (read before updating)** > - **Bridge data moved out of `%LOCALAPPDATA%`** into your game install folder. The client now asks for (or you set in `host.yaml`) your **WitchSpring R install path** on first use. See the README. > - **Generate fresh seeds** with 0.2.0 — seeds made on 0.1.3 won't have the new checks or logic.
### Cross-platform & save reliability - Bridge files now live in the **game install folder** (`<game>/Archipelago/`) instead of `%LOCALAPPDATA%`, so the mod works under **Steam Deck / Proton / macOS**. - **Per-seed session folders** keep multiple seeds/saves cleanly separated — items and checks from one seed can never bleed into another. - **Crash / Alt-F4 resilience:** items not yet written to your save are re-delivered on reload (save-marker reconcile); the delivery queue retries then skips a bad item instead of stalling; writes are atomic. - **Items now deliver everywhere in the game.** The "safe to deliver" scene list previously only covered early areas, so items received in later chapters silently didn't arrive — it now covers the whole game (~200 scenes).
### Universal Tracker - Added **Universal Tracker support** (generates without a yaml, reads slot data).
### World coverage & goals - Playable range expanded; still largely untested beyond Chapter 3 but should function through Chapter 9. - New regions: **RedBeard's Cave, Kanna's House, Luna's House, Ice Cave, Frozen Altar**. - Removed the phantom "Chapter 8" (the game goes 7 → 9); the chapter-9 goal is now reachable.
### New location checks - Around **two dozen new checks** across the game: event rewards (weapon-upgrade materials, key story items, etc.), **blessing checks** (Arua, Aimhard, Elysion, Durok), and **battle-reward checks** (Boar Captain, Shipwreck Cabin Key). - Blessings are now sendable via a new in-game hook (they're granted differently from normal items, so they were previously unsendable). - Missable / one-time checks are marked so the generator never hides required progression behind them.
### Progression-logic fixes - **Mind Control Circle** is back in the pool and properly gates the content that needs it (Swamp, South Island, the Fire Cave branch, weapon-upgrade handout, and one entrance chest). - **Reaching Chapter 2** now correctly requires the Fire Magic Spellbook **and** the Mind Control Circle; the Fire Spellbook itself sits behind Mind Control. - **South Island** access now requires the Fire Magic Spellbook (you pass Black Joe on the way), so it can't be stranded behind that gate. - **Reaching Chapter 3** now requires actually being able to reach the Lalaque Mine (Boar Captain's Tooth), not just holding the Mine Key. - **Reaching Chapter 6** now requires the Prototype Steam Engine. - **Ice Magic Spellbook** gates the Ice Cave and Durok Temple. - **Laoba Mountain** (Warrior Camp) is available earlier — as soon as you've beaten the Boar Captain — instead of being locked to Chapter 3. - Shipwreck progression modeled properly (Hold Key → Armory/Cabin Key → boss → Aimhard). - Swim-only spots (a South Island islet, the Royal Pudding fight) now require the Aged Lalaque Berry (the swimming-pet item) so they aren't logically required before you can reach them. - Numerous smaller rule corrections and a fixed Boar-Captain's-Tooth rule typo.
### Item pool - **Removed craftable spell circles that soft-lock their quest** if received early (4-Orb Flame, 4-Pillar Ice) and the 3-Orb you already start with. - Removed redundant / trap / non-functional items from the pool (e.g. Shipwreck Cannonball, Great Key, Matt's Garden Passage Key, a duplicate Red Gem, the phantom Chapter 8). - Reclassified the Aged Lalaque Berry to progression (it now gates swim content) and Frozen Heart to filler.
### Plugin / quality - New in-game **event blockers** (CheckSwitch hook) that gate story events safely without hard-locking. - Cleaned up logging: routine per-event chatter is now hidden/debug-level, so the BepInEx console stays quiet unless something actually goes wrong.

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16909567
entry.content:
**To see notes and what's new for alpha03, see [alpha03a](https://github.com/JKLeckr/Archipelago-cuphead/releases/tag/alpha03a)**
_**WARNING:** If you are using Chalice Checks for King's Leap, you MUST update the client to [alpha03e](https://github.com/JKLeckr/CupheadArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/alpha03e)_
### Revision
This revision adds support to chalice checks in King's Leap (it wasn't supported, but it was not marked as unsupported in options).

entry.title: YARG v0.0.19
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for the Luge 01 Setlist
## What's Changed * Added Luge 01 Pack by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/42
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.18...0.0.19

entry.title: Pikuniku v0.3.1
entry.content: - [APWorld] Fixed logic bug where Forest Dancing Bug didn't logically require Water Hat - [Client] Changed the Valley Revisit to only be raining if you have the Water Hat, preventing you from going out of logic if backtracking there for missed checks. - [Client] Fixed shop items not being purchaseable if you have been sent the respective item

entry.title: Halo The Master Chief Collection v1.1.2
entry.content:
# What's New - different ending missions other than the maw are now possible, this can be configured through a new option in the YAML - Windows Store Support
# other fixes - added manifest file to apworld - switched logic to rule builder

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.6
## Client Changes - Client now waits for the dungeon to be fully initialized before modifying atla info to avoid unlikely issue - Correctly unlock map access to DHC when unlocking the final dungeon - Autobuild: Fixed placement issues if mushroom/Couscous house received before related Earth piece - Autobuild: Tweak to how buildings are placed to lead to a little less jitter for current town
No .apworld changes made; works with older worlds/saves

entry.title: A Link Between Worlds v0.3.0
entry.content:
### New Features - Small keys, big keys, and compasses can be shuffled outside of their dungeons. The "Keysy" option is no longer its own option as it has been merged with the key shuffle options. - New `nice_items` option `upgrades` shuffles 9 item upgrades into the pool. These item upgrades do nothing unless you also receive the item itself, in which case they give you the nice version of the item. New `super_items` option `upgrades` does the same with super items.
### Changes - Reworked 3DS connection code to reduce errors. - Patcher shows a loading bar and writes to a log file. - Colors of rupees in shops are now correct.

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.7.0
entry.content: ### 13 New Traps and 1 filler: - 144p Trap - Chaos Control Trap - Flood Trap - Input Sequence Trap - Math Quiz Trap - Number Sequence Trap - Pokemon Trivia Trap - Screen Flip Trap - Shuffle Trap - Swap Trap - Trivia Trap - Yap Trap - Zoom Trap - New filler Thrive

entry.title: Nonopelagram v0.6.7
entry.content: Thanks to https://github.com/Serial-Developer for fixes and features

entry.title: Cobalt Core v1.2.0
entry.content:
Full release of [1.2.0-rc1](https://github.com/Isaac-SOL/CobaltCoreArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/release%2F1.2.0-rc1) and [1.2.0-rc2](https://github.com/Isaac-SOL/CobaltCoreArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/release%2F1.2.0-rc2), finally fixing most of their bugs. Additional tweaks to the APWorld will come in a later version.
Sorry for taking a long time with this one, I've gotten very busy as I've started working on a game! On that note, I'll be taking a pseudo-break from the mod until it is released, which I'm planning to do within the year. I will still be responding to questions on the discord and keeping an eye out for easy fixes and small suggestions, releasing patches when I have the time. The next big step after that will be support for content mods!
## Tweaks
- Setting `rewards_tweak` to `more_unlocked` will now guarantee at least one unlocked card in events, such as the "high-pitched static" event for example - CAT no longer announces AP items we are giving to ourselves - Hovering over the CAT messages to look at your artifacts now hides the message box - Removed the "choose profile" button in the main menu, as it was behaving weirdly and causing issues. If you want to change profiles, restart the game.
## Fixes
- Fixed a crash when you start with 7 or more characters including CAT - The game now correctly renders item names containing the `<` character - The game will no longer give you locked starting cards when `randomize_starting_cards` is `false` and you have less than 3 characters
The APWorld and YAML options are identical to 1.2.0-rc2, and do not need to be updated.

entry.title: Cobalt Core v1.2.1
entry.content:
Fixes a gamebreaking crash.
## Fixes
- Fixes a crash happening whenever you take an AP artifact with only one item in it
The APWorld and YAML options are identical to 1.2.0, and do not need to be updated.

entry.title: Mini Metro v0.2.1a0
entry.content: Recent Changes - Added an additional goal "Goal Map". Allows you to set the goal of completing a specific map up to the target week - Made Logic more consistent and forgiving for early items. - Minor Bug Fixes

entry.title: The Farmer Was Replaced v0.0.7b0
entry.content:
For installation instructions, please [see the (new!) setup guide](https://github.com/seadoggie001/Archipelago/blob/theFarmerWasReplaced/worlds/tfwr/docs/setup_en.md)
## Features #### Randomized Crop Costs Why should carrots be the only crops with two items required to plant them? Randomize your crop costs with a new option. - Crops have a 30% chance to cost two items - Power is not included as a cost for crops due to the lower yield - Hay and Bushes are always free
#### More locations Harvesting 10 and 10 million crops were feeling left out. Added where appropriate.
## Fixes - Save-switching bug: one cause of issues around changing the save was resolved. ~~(Completely by accident)~~ - Logical fixes especially around crops. You can't be logically required to get 10M carrots if you can't get 10M of it's cost. - More logical fixes: lots of hay needs space to grow, pumpkins need `IF`, mazes need space to grow, and more

entry.title: Rabbit and Steel v0.3.3
entry.content:
6+ runs crashing (may have fixed 4+ shira ending early, but didnt test deliberately) DLC itemsets are in the pool Fixed visuals for starting with the opposite kingdom type than the game expected
# Changelog
All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/) and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).
## [v0.3.3](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/compare/v0.3.2...v0.3.3) - 2026-06-18
### Commits
- add the lost hooks [`3372fa8`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/3372fa8ff642148326d94cd3031b85f747da4068) - add todo note [`b30996f`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/b30996f1d99bd3cf849ac11087a49cced1e50e57) - update workflow [`95b096b`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/95b096beb70b7e3325f162101498aab83ddd7348) - Update reloaded.yml [`28e8fd7`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/28e8fd7b4faa9b54fd4a4072cf139fb7e8052354) - Update ClassHandler.cs [`e874960`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/e8749604a9dc8d10a33664f7510408487bec48dc) - Add DLC itemsets to AddItemsFromItemset [`3ee15fb`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/3ee15fb63c229521674269d7ed074c9b44f1f3b5) - Fix 6+ runs crashing and maybe 4+ Shira bug [`497631b`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/497631b6ed11dd890660b95de817582a9dfd21c5) - Update the background for mismatched kingdom start [`4c1f118`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/4c1f1180bb9f14bfc74133b76a92777be2445347)

New: - Support for the Pronoun Palace 01 Setlist

entry.title: FF1 Pixel Remaster v0.6.0
entry.content: - Fix some locations naming - AP - Data is now written to save file - AP - Checks are resent on game load - AP - Receiving the Ship on the overworld will spawn it - AP - General resiliency improvement

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.32
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed multiple plugins nullifying each other's modifications to the ROM - Fixed modifications to arm7 not being written to the ROM
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT

entry.title: TUNIC v5.0.0
entry.content: # Version 5.0.0 ### Backwards compatibility with existing seeds: - Single Player Randomizer: ❌ - Archipelago: ⚠️ - The tunic.apworld file was updated in this version. - This update is fully compatible with games generated on Archipelago 0.6.7 and the Archipelago website. - Save files started on Version 4.2.7 can be picked up where they were left off after updating, with the following exception: - For Entrance Rando seeds, set your spawn point at any save statue before updating, otherwise you may encounter a black screen when loading the file on 5.0.0. - If you generate a game using the 5.0.0 apworld, every Tunic player in that game must update to the 5.0.0 mod, even if they're not using the new settings. There are new filler item IDs in the apworld that will cause issues on the old mod. ## Check out everything new on the [Randomizer Website!](https://rando.tunic.run/) # Fox Prince (by @ScipioWright) ### A brand new Entrance Randomizer mode with features inspired by Blue Prince. (Not compatible with Archipelago.) - Every entrance you enter will prompt you with three entrances to choose from. Your choice will then be locked in for that transition for the rest of the seed. - New items have been added in this mode for use when choosing an entrance (dice for re-rolling, darts to pin an entrance for later) - Special thanks to fletchisafurry for their East Forest and Ziggurat map images! # Shuffle Enemy Drops + Shuffle Enemy Souls ### All enemies drop a check when defeated. Available in both Single Player and Archipelago. - Adds around 600 checks, with an additional "extra" option to include New Game+ and Nighttime enemies for ~100 more checks. - **Shuffling Enemy Souls** splits up the progression by making it so enemies do not appear in the world until their corresponding "soul" item is found. (Requires Enemy Drops to be shuffled.) - Poptracker support for enemy checks is in the works for a future update. - Unchecked enemies will have a differently colored Z-Target ring, and can still be found via the Seeking Spell. # Trick & Glitch Logic Toggle ladder storage, ice grappling, and/or laurels shortcuts in logic, with varying levels of difficulty. (These options already existed for Archipelago, but have now been ported to the standalone randomizer) ## Archipelago Updates - Added a "Connect Via Player Link" button on the main menu, which allows you to right click -> copy link on your player name from an Archipelago room page and connect with a single button press. - With the newest apworld, opening the archipelago launcher via the room page will now prompt you to launch either the text client, universal tracker, or TUNIC directly. Launching TUNIC this way will automatically connect you once the game loads to the title screen. - Room passwords do not get populated with the above methods and must still be manually entered. - Death Link messages have been overhauled and now more accurately describe what killed you. - The Laurels and Questagon hints now sync with the Archipelago text client. - Universal Tracker now supports Deferred Entrances for Entrance Rando. - Added fuse locations to the poptracker maps for Universal Tracker - Added location groups for all grass/breakable/enemy checks to the APworld - Minor logic fixes and tweaks in the APworld - Players can no longer be interrupted by other players sending them an item while typing holy cross codes. - Death/Trap Links can no longer be received during the credits - The potion-forming animation will no longer get stuck on repeat while receiving a bunch of items. # Quick Settings Redux ### The randomizer menu has received an overhaul, now providing easy access to every setting found within the mod. # Seeking Spell Options You can now filter what types of checks the seeking spell will search for, including: - In-Logic Checks - Default/Vanilla Checks - Grass - Breakables - Fuses & Bells - Enemies # Misc. Toggles - **CRT Filter**: Render the game with a CRT effect overlay - **Faster Item Queue**: For Archipelago, makes the item queue process faster and skip filler animations when receiving large amounts of items at once. - **Fool Trap Toggles**: You can now set each individual fool trap type to be either on/off/trap link only. There are a handful of new traps that were made specifically for trap link with non-tunic games that can now be enabled for yourself. New trap effects include CRT, Bald, Home (teleports you to overworld), Whoops!, W I D E, Zoom Out, Color Saturation, MP Depletion, Disarm (unequips all items), and Fast (speeds up the game). ## Other Changes & Bugfixes - Reduced the range of the Librarian and Heir swords. - Several optimizations to (hopefully) improve performance of the mod. - Added controller button mappings for the ending screen actions (release/collect/skip credits/hide stats). - The Heir can now be fought in Hexagon Quest. (Note: The logic does not account for this as it would normally.) - Fixed the cathedral elevator disappearing with shuffled fuses. - Added a tuning fork outside of the temple when ladders are shuffled in order to get back down from the upper right path. - Added a light source outside of the Cathedral Secret Legend door to highlight the chest. - Added ladder/fuse decorations near the overworld info sign depending on which is enabled. - The Chalkboard in the Sealed Temple now displays split counts for Overworld and Overworld Interiors. - Added an icon for the laurels-toggle item. - Added a small sfx/animation when unlocked abilities. - Fixed several ghost fox Trunic typos. - Added failsafe for wrong warping and getting stuck out of bounds due to the deathplane patch. - Added launch params to force the TUNC title screen or Mr Mayor mode (`-tunc` and `-mayor`) - Other things I am probably forgetting.

entry.title: Civilization V v0.10.0
entry.content:
NOTE: Several new options were added, so the YAML template needs to be regenerated.
**General**: - A grand total of 168 new locations (263 -> 431) have been added with various sanities: Unitsanity; Settlersanity; and Promotionsanity (with icons by @RaindropDry). - Deathlink with 4 possible triggers and 9 possible effects split over 31 weighted options was added. - Many more filler and trap items.
**Changes/Improvements**: - Items sent to the game are now tracked on the save file. - Receiving an item now shows an alert in-game with what you received. - Getting a sanity check now reverts the name/description back to vanilla without item hint. - Added a BK Mode project available from the start for all cities. - Future Tech has been replaced with Culture Boost, which gives you a large culture bonus for a high science price. - Bonus AP Techs now just use numbers instead of "Bonus" in their name. - Client now has some leniency with Civ V not responding in time. This improves connection with Civ V on lower-spec machines. - Client has the Civ V icon now in the Archipelago Launcher. - Units can no longer become obsolete. - Updated README with tons more information and troubleshooting info. - Added ability to combine requirements using both AND and OR logic. Can be stacked indefinitely. - Opening the patch file on Linux now automatically converts the mod folder and all mod files to lowercase, to avoid case-sensitivity issues when running Civ V on Linux. - All filler and trap items now have weighting options.
**Fixes**: - Fixed two AP policies having incorrect requirements. - Fixed bug where Traps were incorrectly marked as Filler. - Tradition Finisher now properly sends the Aqueduct building location, if Buildingsanity is on.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1313e/Civ-V-AP-World/compare/v0.9.8...v0.10.0

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.8
entry.content:
Hopefully fixed broken Norsca buildings
New [submods](https://github.com/jordansds/TWW3-Recruit-Without-Buildings/releases) available if you want to recruit units without buildings.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.10.7...v0.10.8

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.7
## Client Change - Cancelled the Infinite Llama Experience (fixed a bug detecting that a save is loaded)
No .apworld changes made; works with older worlds/saves

entry.title: Zork Grand Inquisitor v2.1.2
entry.content:
This is an improvement release that also includes tweaks and fixes.
**This release IS compatible with games generated on the previous version**
- **Improvement:** Checked locations are now seeded from the AP server upon connection. Helps with granting missable locations upon further reconnections - **Improvement:** After sliding the Zork Rocks in the locker and backing out, the explosion will happen immediately! No need to wait for the full countdown - **Tweak:** Mead Light is now a permanent item to avoid the possibility of a rare entrance randomizer softlock - **Tweak:** Mead Light? and ZIMDOR is Undamaged are no longer considered missable - **Tweak:** Spell Check Complete is now considered missable and granted when going back to the scroll box after imbuing BEBURTT - **Fix:** Addressed an issue where missable locations with multiple location requirements would be granted right away after meeting 1 requirement

entry.title: Zork Grand Inquisitor v2.2.0
entry.content:
This is an improvement release.
**This release IS compatible with games generated on the previous version**
- **Improvement:** Switched supported ScummVM version from 2.7.1 (March 2023) to 2026.2.0 (March 2026) - This up-to-date ScummVM version feature numerous improvements for ZVision (the Zork Grand Inquisitor game engine): - Completely overhauled rendering + proper widescreen support - Improvements to quality of 3D directional audio & nonlinear volume scaling - Restored functionality of some in-game options controls - Game script fixes
**IMPORTANT**
A vanilla game script refers to a non-existent file regardless of the game version you own. That file will need to be created to avoid ScummVM crashing when operating the totemizer. Locate `me00h64p.raw` (for GOG, it's in `zassetse\eng_aud`; for Steam, it's in `ZASSETS2\MONAST2`). Make a copy and rename it to `me00h62p.raw`. The file has always been missing, but later ScummVM versions started crashing instead of ignoring the exception

entry.title: Cookie Clicker v0.8.3
entry.content:
This release brings stability improvements to logic :information_source: This client IS retrocompatible with older version 0.8.x version (not alpha/beta), so you can update during an ongoing game. :warning: This apworld is NOT retromcompatible with previous clients. To use it, update your client to 0.8.3.
## New yaml option * Plentiful Buildings: Additional Building Copies to the pull
## Bug fixes * Fix Hardcore achievements being impossible. It now requires to bake 1Q cookies without buying Cookie Upgrades. It's now in sphere 2 * Fix some prestige items unlocking themselves after ascending * Fix eggs achievements not checking properly * Improve logic for more sphere stability. It should hopefully fix trackers telling you unreachable checks being "in logic"
## Acknowledgements * @SoraUltimateProgrammer made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/1 * @wjg999 made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/4 * @TeamLila made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/2
Thanks a lot for helping grow this apworld !!
## Misc. * This github now has a [discussion space](https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/discussions) ! You can send ideas there and express opinions. This is a place that comes in addition to the AP discord server, in order to keep track of ideas

entry.title: Parkitect v1.4.1
entry.content:
Installation can be found [here](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation)
Enjoy!
NOTE: This release is not backwards compatible with seeds generated **before** 1.2.1 This release may not fully compatible with seeds generated **before** 1.4.0
# Parkitect Archipelago — Release Notes ## QOL - TrapLink can now be changed with commands via the Archipelago Window Input Field (Case & whitespace insensitive !) - !!toggleTrapLink - !!joinTrapLink - !!leaveTrapLink

entry.title: Cookie Clicker v0.8.4
entry.content:
This release is a hotfix and only includes updates of the client. :information_source: This release is retrocompatible with 0.8.3. See [0.8.3](https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/releases/tag/0.8.3) for more details on retrocompatibility.
## Fix 3rd occurrence of Progressive temple would not correctly unlock the upgrade.
## Notes Just updating your client is fine and will fix the issue. You will received the upgrade upon connection. Apworld is identical to 0.8.3

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.33
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed multiple changes to the base ROM being reverted in previous updates - Made the Plasma grunts in Chargestone Cave always stay in the cave - This fixes them potentially never appearing when playing through Chargestone Cave in reverse - Added an NPC to the southern entrance of Chargestone Cave that throws you to the northern exit - He only appears after defeating N in Chargestone Cave - Removed the forced Musical Theater dress up minigame - Fixed the fight with N in Nacrene City being missable when doing the Pinwheel Forest events before that - Added a bit of funny dialog at the start of the game - Added an NPC next to the Pokémon Center in Accumula Town, who will be used for a feature in 0.4.0
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT

entry.title: witchspringrap v0.3.0
entry.content:
Adds in-game Archipelago messages and three optional "sanity" check categories (Battlesanity, Bestiary, QuestSanity), plus logic and naming fixes.
> **⚠️ Upgrade notes (read before updating)** > - **Both files must be updated together:** install the new `witchspringrap.apworld` **and** the new `WitchSpringRArchipelago.dll`. They are a matched pair. > - **Generate fresh seeds** with 0.3.0 — the new options and checks won't exist on older seeds. > - The new check categories are **optional toggles, off by default** — your existing yaml keeps working unchanged.
### In-game messages - The game now shows **"Sent <item> to <player>"** when you trigger a check and **"Received <item> from <player>"** when an item is delivered, in the top-left info bar.
### New optional check categories (yaml toggles) - **Please note that naming conventions and logic may not be fully proper for these settings as of yet** - **Battlesanity** — a check for clearing each field battle (sends on win). ~136 checks. - **Bestiary** — a check for defeating each enemy; any rank/shield variant counts. ~101 checks. - **QuestSanity** — a check for completing each quest (main + request-board; sends when the quest is cleared, however it completes). ~140 checks. - Each is a separate toggle (default **off**); the item pool auto-pads with filler so seeds stay fillable when they're enabled.
### Fixes - **Region name:** "Blackhill Golem Cave" corrected to **"Backhill Golem Cave"**. - **Arua Blessing** now also requires the Fire Magic Spellbook and Mind Control Circle (it isn't actually reachable until you can leave the starting area). - Minor per-check chapter-gating fixes from playtesting.

entry.title: witchspringrap v0.3.1
entry.content: Forgot to save the basic logic to questsanity. Still not perfect, but better than before

entry.title: witchspringrap v0.3.2
entry.content: Updated logic for Battlesanity/Questsanity/Bestiary Also added Livya, Justice and Demon of Greed who were previously missing from the list.

entry.title: Cookie Clicker v0.8.5
entry.content:
This release brings stability improvements to logic :information_source: This client IS retrocompatible with older version 0.8.x version (not alpha/beta), so you can update during an ongoing game. :warning: This apworld is NOT retromcompatible with previous clients. To use it, update your client to 0.8.3.
## New yaml option * Plentiful Buildings: Additional Building Copies to the pull
## Bug fixes * Fix Hardcore achievements being impossible. It now requires to bake 1Q cookies without buying Cookie Upgrades. It's now in sphere 2 * Fix some prestige items unlocking themselves after ascending * Fix eggs achievements not checking properly * Improve logic for more sphere stability. It should hopefully fix trackers telling you unreachable checks being "in logic" * Fix last tier of Progressive temples not unlocking * Fix 0.8.3/0.8.4 bug of Progressive Buildings not unlocking buildings
## Acknowledgements * @SoraUltimateProgrammer made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/1 * @wjg999 made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/4 * @TeamLila made their first contribution in https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/pull/2
Thanks a lot for helping grow this apworld !!
## Misc. * This github now has a [discussion space](https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/discussions) ! You can send ideas there and express opinions. This is a place that comes in addition to the AP discord server, in order to keep track of ideas

entry.title: A Link Between Worlds v0.3.1
entry.content: Fixes a regression that made the apworld incompatible with the Citra emulator. This release is backward compatible with v0.3.0.

entry.title: Etrian Odyssey v0.3.1
entry.content:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.3.1 [Beta]
Small hotfix.
This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.
The host does not need to install this version. Game generated with 0.3.0 are compatible with this. Only patching and the client are changed. Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.
This version requires the [patcher version v0.3.1](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.3.1).
## Fixes
- Client bug causing inventory items to be skipped under specific circumstance when the item reception buffer got full. - Quest 09 (Explorers Guild Trial) custom event playing on every tiles.

entry.title: Paper Mario The Thousand Year Door v0.10.3
entry.content:
## Changes - The client should now properly write the required TTYD settings in dolphin to the correct config, on Windows and Mac/Linux. It is now recommended to let the client set these for you instead of manually, and it is safe to uncheck the settings in dolphin and let the per-game config take over. - Patching will no longer fail with a patch/apworld mispatch, it will now warn you in the client that you should update to match them.
## Fixes - Fix for some tattlesanity locations being bugged and sending out early, and having some unintended consequences including crashing and setting random story flags - Fix for deathlink not sending or being received correctly. - Shop locations will now properly follow the shop purchase limit rule with remote items enabled - Tattles and some boxes that weren't syncing properly will now properly sync in same slot co-op and when starting a new file with an in-progress game.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jamesbrq/ArchipelagoTTYD/compare/v0.10.2...main

entry.title: Parkitect v1.5.0
entry.content: Well as usual you find all information at the [mod](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect/releases/tag/1.5.0)!

entry.title: Portal 2 v0.7.2
entry.content:
## Additions
- Added integrated UT support (thanks to Tenebrosful) - Added polling to only flush command queue while in game (delays deathlink and traps until the play enters a map) - Updated speedrun logic (thanks to Savvydruid)
See the [mod page](https://github.com/GlassToadstool/Portal2ArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/0.7.0) for previous additions.
## Note You must use the latest (v0.7.0) version of the [Portal 2 Archipelago Mod](https://github.com/GlassToadstool/Portal2ArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/0.7.0) with this version of the apworld.

entry.title: Phantasy Star II v0.1.2
entry.content: Bug fix for `Exception: world.item_data is 127 long`.

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.34
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed client crashes resulting from the recently added funny dialog - Fixed small bugs of the recently added funny dialog - Tweaked the Chargestone Cave chuckster throwing animation - Fixed the new NPC in Accumula Town not appearing
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT

entry.title: Banjo Tooie v4.12.1
entry.content: # 4.12.1 - Thanks to Umed for the following fixes: - Fixes for Ares and Gopher64 - removing lua arguments (breaking Bizhawk) - Remove "Press B to Skip" text from Signposts

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.8
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.8
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Dicey Dungeons v0.4.1b0
entry.content:
Changes from v0.4.0-beta - Floor 5 shops no longer have prices fixed at 4 gold per item - Level up rewards now respect equipment availability - Upgrade level rewards are now Copies if playing with Upgrade all equipment
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/compare/v0.4.0-beta...v0.4.1-beta

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.8.post2
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.8
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.1.0
entry.content:
You must build the 0.1.0 sm64ex build for use with this apworld. Going forward, updates that break compatibility between the apworld and the sm64ex build will increment the first or second value of the version number, non-breaking updates will increment the last value. The "archipelago" sm64ex branch will always be the latest, but you may also enter a version number to get an older version.
- Non-stop mode is enabled by default, with a patch file provided to return it to "stop mode." - Freestanding 1-Ups and "Exclamation Boxes" have been combined into one option: One Up Checks. - A new option has been added: Blocksanity. Adds checks for breaking all exclamation blocks and cap blocks. - Hazy Maze Cave is now included in Locked Paintings. - Tiny Island and Huge Island paintings are unlocked separately. - Several logic adjustments and fixes. - Location and Item name groups have been added. - Item name and classifications were adjusted. - No Despawns now grants coins and 1-Ups that end up on deadly quicksand. Mini Goombas now drop their coin if they attack. - The coins spawned during the final Bowser battle no longer increment your coin counter.

entry.title: Outer Wilds v1.2.2
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/OuterWildsArchipelagoRandomizer#installation).
- @RS_Mind attempted to work around a Forgotten Castaways bug where the "Recursive Node" sometimes doesn't spawn. It's too inconsistent for anyone to pin down exact causes, but we suspect having many other mods loaded makes it more likely, which would explain why only randomizer players seem to be reporting it. - Logic fixes: - Since you can't carry both a DLC Artifact and the Echo Hike Threader at the same time, Starlit Cove is no longer in logic if the Threader is your only logical way of reaching Cinder Isles (fixes #98 ). - Added an explicit "Hearth's Neighbor Museum Plate" region to the HN1 logic to help remind players how to unlock the warp to the HN1 system - Suitless logic for the text wheel inside the Frozen Shuttle now requires Spacesuit - "DW: Starlit Cove Upper Tower Floors" logic is now aware that Raft Docks Patch is an alternative to Dream Totem Patch - "Find Gabbro's Ship" location is no longer incorrectly triggered by the ship on Bracket's Rest in FQ. - Fix Nomai text coloring exception spam on unscouted locations (the feature is still unsupported/broken, but this quick fix reduces the odds of it breaking unrelated stuff)

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.4
entry.content:
[Setup Guide](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/setup_en.md) - [Q&A](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/en_DELTARUNE.md)
Hello, this is the last patch before the embargo of chapter 5, expect no update before the 2.1.0 chapter 5 release. Dev will begin at least 1 week after the chapter release. DELTARUNE in 2 tomorrow.
## **This will be the last version before Chapter 5 drops. From then, there will be a week embargo before development of this mod resumes. If you want to play this mod, you'll have to downpatch your base DELTARUNE back to version 1.04, which is the last version before chapter 5 (More info on the Archipelago Discord). Stay tuned!**
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta, the Ch1+2 Demo, or Chapter 5 versions will not work.)
**Linux is not supported for now and will disconnect you after few seconds from the server! Linux will be supported in future updates**
**Starting a chapter with previous chapter completion data isn't recommended for right now as the rewrite wasn't made with it in mind. This will be fixed soon!**
# Changelog ## APWorld - Added TensionBit and BShotBowtie to the Fusion Ingredient category - Fix Accessibility for TwistedSwd and TensionBow
## Game - Game now properly goal again.. oops - Saving settings is now before scouting locations - Grouping some location checks into a single package instead of multiple - Most locations will now send before the textbox appears, in case of a softlock - Added some missing reward previews ### Chapter 3 - Fixed the Shadow Mantle fight only being accessible if you _did not_ have the SHELTER KEY - Made the room with the Shuttah and Zapper encounter immune to receiving items as it can softlock the game.. for some reason

entry.title: Spirit Valley v2.0.1
entry.content:
- (Client) Fixed old masters main quest not asking for right spirit - (Client) Fixed Certain items not being added to inventory properly - (Client) Added colour to console
V2.0.0 changelog - (APWorld/Client) Added Option/Logic for Disabling Main/Side Quests - (APWorld/Client) Added Option/Logic for Different Goals (Complete all Main Missions(deafult), Catch all Spirits, Catch all Rare Spirits, Get All Spirits to Max Affection) - (APWorld/Client) Added Items/Logic for Mission Warps(TumbleweedTown -> CrashSite, CoconutVillage Temple -> ColdHarbor, Trail18 -> Trail19) when Main Missions are Disabled - (APWorld/Client) Added locations for EV-3 Side Quests in HQ unless Side Quests are Disabled (NOTE: these will not be filled with progression items at this time) - (APWorld) Fixed errors in Default Trainers - (Client) Fixed not sending location when defeating Alice on Trail 11 - (Client) Made Mission Warps(TumbleweedTown -> CrashSite, CoconutVillage Temple -> ColdHarbor, Trail18 -> Trail19) Repeatable - (Client) Made Quest/Boss battles still happen when Main/Side Missions are Disabled - (Client) Added codes "$goal" and "$stuck"
INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS:
CLIENT: - Have Spirit Valley Installed - Download Spirit Valley Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Spirit Valley Archipelago Client V#.#.#.zip" to the directory where "SpiritValley.exe" is
APWORLD (needed for generating archieplago game): - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Spirit Valley APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Spirit Valley APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recommended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default spirit valley YMAL

entry.title: Library of Ruina v1.0.0
entry.content:
As always, check known bugs and report bugs in #70
**Unsubscribe from workshop mod!**
**NEW RUN REQUIRED**
**Uses -epsilon .apworld** ## What changed since -alpha: <details> <summary>In older versions</summary>
### In -beta: - FIXED: Custom books are now properly saved - FIXED: Now you can't put books into the invitation manually, and can't find receptions earlier that way - FIXED: Impossible Passive Attribution Points (Needs testing, but i'm 99% sure it's fixed now) - FIXED: Receptions are no longer visible after joining new session without closing the game - FIXED: It's not possible to open Black Silence and Distorted Ensemble before you reach those battles ### In -gamma: - CHANGED: Updated reception tree looks in the game. the reception box of doom. It's only for testing, so bear with me. - CHANGED & FIXED: Changed how run seeds work. Fixed stuff related to them (also thanks Yar) ### In -delta: - ADDED: Modified passive attribution system. Can now attribute up to 16 books. Passive Limits Break Item now works - FIXED: Impossible keypages and pages don't drop now (i hope)
</details>
### In -epsilon: - CHANGED: Updated reception tree looks in the game. It's a pretty simple Sugiyama's algorithm with minimized edge-crossing for now. Hopefully i can figure out something fancier later. Also cool placement for endgoals - CHANGED: The checkmark for completed stages been changed to be a "status" of the stage: Checkmark is shown when the reception is cleared (completed + all checks collected); An exclamation mark is shown when the reception can be cleared (player has right books to start the stage) - CHANGED: Suppressions/Realization are now accessed on the map the say way Receptions are. - CHANGED: Playing with "Enemies Turn Into Checks" Option now sends remaining checks on stage clear (main purpose of that option was always to allow to chip at the enemy and get more checks to potentially escape BK situation, and not fight Xiao 8 times) - CHANGED: Items should now get received faster when in bulk (PLEASE REPORT ANY CRASHES!) - CHANGED: Custom icons are now also used for BoE (not yet available tee hee), Booster Packs and library progress level - ADDED: Floor Stages (Abnos/Realizations) now have a roman number specifying the order of the stage - ADDED: Shuffle Reverb Ensemble Floors option - ADDED: Endgoals always unlocked option - FIXED: Binah librarian shortage \[By Yar] - FIXED: Divide by 0 error \[By Yar] - FIXED: Keter Realization now works properly (Snow queen part & snow queen suppression are not fixed yet, also when binah is replaced by angela, angela will be locked if player doesn't have Binah item, not sure if i have to fix that) - FIXED: Item hints position on differently sized screens (SOMEONE PLEASE TEST AND TELL ME IF IT WORKS!) - FIXED: Leave stage button in the team setup window before the fight now works all the time - FIXED: Binah (and librarians with base keypages) can now get passives attributed - REMOVED: The chapter shortcut buttons for the map & chapter filter for book burning screen have been removed - REMOVED: The option to NOT randomize the reception tree is DISCONTINUED!

entry.title: budokai_tenkaichi2 v0.3.3
entry.content: Save Skip Option Added
